product_overview: Antigravity Agent is a topic-triggered web app platform that combines a landing page, interactive product/app UI, and backend-driven state handling. It is designed to provide a polished navigation experience, a visually rich carousel-based showcase, and persistent cart interactions.
core_goals: Provide a global navigation experience with clear routing and a sliding cart drawer
Showcase products through an interactive carousel and category-based browsing
Maintain a consistent shopping cart state across the UI using centralized state management
Deliver a responsive, accessible front-end experience backed by simple API endpoints

features.name: Home Navigation View
features.description: A global navbar that lets users navigate the site and open a sliding cart drawer from any page.
user_flows: GET / with no auth -> Receive 200 HTML for the main webpage -> User interacts with navbar links and cart control -> Cart drawer opens in the UI
GET / with no auth -> Receive 200 HTML -> User requests navigation from an unavailable route or broken link -> Receive 404 or failed navigation state and remain on a safe page

features.name: Product Carousel Showcase
features.description: An interactive GSAP card-fan carousel that displays 28 clean pet food items with pagination controls and category filtering.
user_flows: GET /#products with no auth -> Receive 200 HTML containing the products section -> User browses carousel items and category strip -> Product cards render with paginated controls
GET /#products with no auth -> Receive 200 HTML -> User requests products with an invalid or empty filter state -> UI shows an empty/filtered state with no matching items

features.name: Zustand Cart Handler
features.description: A global shopping cart state manager that links product selections to the cart drawer and keeps items in sync across components.
user_flows: POST /cart with a valid cart mutation payload -> Receive 200 Object confirming updated cart state -> UI reflects the new item count in the cart drawer -> User sees updated cart contents
POST /cart with an invalid or malformed payload -> Receive 4xx error response or rejected mutation -> Cart state is not updated and the UI preserves the previous valid state
